exampleSentences: Đương nhiên anh sẽ giúp em khi em gặp khó khăn.
Nếu em mời bạn bè đến nhà thì đương nhiên phải chuẩn bị đồ ăn.
Chị đương nhiên đồng ý với ý kiến tốt như vậy.
notes_md:
**đương nhiên** = “of course,” “naturally.” It shows something is obvious or expected.

It’s an adverb, usually placed before the verb or at the beginning of the sentence to show certainty.  

It can also soften your tone — instead of sounding surprised, you’re saying “that’s obvious.”  
Close synonyms: **tất nhiên** (very similar), **dĩ nhiên** (a bit more formal).

definitions.en: Something obvious or natural, not needing to be argued or explained.
definitions.vi: Điều hiển nhiên, không cần phải bàn cãi hoặc giải thích.

example.en: Of course, you have the right to express your opinion.
example.vi: Bạn đương nhiên có quyền nói ý kiến của mình.

translation.en: I will do that of course.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Of course I will help you when you have difficulties.
If you invite friends to your house, of course you have to prepare food.
Of course I agree with such a good idea.
notes:

It’s an adverb, usually placed before the verb or at the beginning of the sentence to show certainty.
